questions.section: Questions for suppliers of guidewires and other neurovascular medical devices
questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships you have with Medtronic and/or Scientia.

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of guidewires and other neurovascular medical devices
questions.text: Who are your main competitors in the supply of guidewires and other neurovascular medical devices in Australia? In your response, please include who your strongest competitors are for each type of neurovascular medical device and the reasons why.

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of guidewires and other neurovascular medical devices
questions.text: Describe how procurement processes with private and public hospitals for the supply of guidewires and other neurovascular medical devices are typically carried out in Australia. In your response, you may wish to identify: a. whether processes are conducted on a product line basis, or whether they can encompass a range of related product lines (i.e. both guidewires and catheters); b. if neurovascular medical devices are added to a panel by private and/or public hospitals, at what stage and by who are decisions made to use and pay for the relevant device; c. any factors that influence a physician’s choice of brand when selecting a guidewire or other neurovascular medical device.

subpoints.text: whether processes are conducted on a product line basis, or whether they can encompass a range of related product lines (i.e. both guidewires and catheters);
if neurovascular medical devices are added to a panel by private and/or public hospitals, at what stage and by who are decisions made to use and pay for the relevant device;
any factors that influence a physician’s choice of brand when selecting a guidewire or other neurovascular medical device

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of guidewires and other neurovascular medical devices
questions.text: If the Acquisition proceeds and the merged entity offered a bundled product of guidewires and other neurovascular medical devices to private and public hospitals in Australia, describe how this offering would impact your ability to compete with the merged entity.

questions.section: Questions for customers of Medtronic and/or Scientia
questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships you have (or have had) with Medtronic and/or Scientia for the supply of guidewires or other neurovascular devices.

questions.section: Questions for customers of Medtronic and/or Scientia
questions.text: Who are the main suppliers of guidewires and other neurovascular medical devices in Australia? In your response, please identify how these suppliers compare (e.g. in relation to price, product features, product quality).

questions.section: Questions for customers of Medtronic and/or Scientia
questions.text: Please identify whether any guidewires or other neurovascular medical devices supplied by Scientia or Medtronic are particularly important or a ‘must have’.

questions.section: Questions for customers of Medtronic and/or Scientia
questions.text: Describe how procurement processes for guidewires and other neurovascular medical devices are carried out by your organisation in Australia. In your response, you may wish to identify: a. whether processes are conducted on a product line basis, or whether they encompass a range of related product lines (e.g. both guidewires and catheters); b. if neurovascular medical devices are added to a panel by private and/or public hospitals, who makes decisions to use and pay for the relevant device, and when are decisions typically made; c. factors that influence a physician’s choice of brand when selecting a guidewire or other neurovascular medical device.

subpoints.text: whether processes are conducted on a product line basis, or whether they encompass a range of related product lines (e.g. both guidewires and catheters);
if neurovascular medical devices are added to a panel by private and/or public hospitals, who makes decisions to use and pay for the relevant device, and when are decisions typically made;
factors that influence a physician’s choice of brand when selecting a guidewire or other neurovascular medical device

questions.section: Questions for customers of Medtronic and/or Scientia
questions.text: Describe whether your organisation currently purchases guidewires and other neurovascular medical devices as a bundled package. Why or why not? In your response, please address whether guidewires are bundled with any of the following products that you procure: a. catheters, b. stent retrievers, c. neurovascular coils, d. flow diverters, and e. liquid embolic agents.
Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
